title: 电话预约
prompt_en: Call the clinic to make an appointment with a doctor.
prompt_zh: 打电话给诊所预约看医生。

title: 描述症状
prompt_en: Describe your symptoms to the doctor.

title: 询问药品
prompt_en: Ask the pharmacist about medicine for a cold.

title: 阅读说明书
prompt_en: Ask the pharmacist to explain the dosage instructions.
prompt_zh: 请药剂师解释用药说明。
